note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. || Soline: Frost Ticket — BURST-I SG Supporter (Water) ENABLER/healer with ZERO direct-damage kit lines (no % ATK / DoT / rider). Solo damage = PURE SG spray from her weapon (normalMult 201.5 / coreMult 200 / hitsPerShot 10 / ammo 9 / reloadFrames 111), governed by the engine base weapon-fire + SG_LANDING_BY_BAND class table — NOTHING in this override adds damage, so her solo total is thin and SG-landing-dominated. Non-damage lines are treated per HARD RULES 2/3 (consumer-present rule): heals wired as `heal` events so recovery-consumers (Crown-style) fire; granted Max HP kept as a stat buff. Validator rejects `ignored`/`unsupported` blocks, so audited SKIPS are documented here (not emitted as blocks). MODELED: (S1a) 'ticket' Max HP — each ticket = +10% of caster Max HP to ALL allies, cap 2; she starts at 1 ticket + issues 1 on every burst (B1 opener → hits cap 2 by end of rotation 1), so steady state = 2 tickets = casterMaxHpPct 20 on allies, modeled `passive` (kit: 'This effect is continuous'). ENGINE NOTE: atkOfMaxHpPct conversion counts a unit's OWN Max HP only (sim.ts:695, cindy-e3 MEASURED), so this ally-granted Max HP is CURRENTLY INERT for HP-scaling ATK — KEPT per HARD RULE 3 (free to leave; deleting destroys a future consumer/scaler; also faithful). (S1b) FB-enter team Burst-CD ▼7.48s → `burstCdr` seconds 7.48 on fullBurstEnter/allies — a ROTATION effect (speeds the whole team's burst cadence). (BURST) 'Recovers 32.26% of caster final Max HP' → `heal` on burstCast/allies — the KEY consumer-wiring line: fires EVERY rotation (B1 opener always casts) → drives any 'on recovery/when healed' team buff (Crown +20.99% AD etc.) per HARD RULE 2 + prior 8. SKIPPED (audited, documented — no valid trigger and/or no scope-lock effect; NOT silent drops): (S1c) FB-enter 'Removes First Train Discount' and (S2b) start-of-battle 'First Train Discount for 6s (effects will not consume tickets)' are TICKET-CONSUMPTION bookkeeping toggles gating whether the S2 HP<15% heal spends a ticket — no damage/stat, no modeled consumer, and the gated heal never fires under scope-lock → inert. (S2a) 'when any squad HP < 15% → recover 12.27% caster Max HP, ticket ▼1' is a HEAL but its trigger is an HP-threshold the engine does not model (scope-lock sims no team damage, so squad HP never drops; and there is no HP-threshold TriggerDef) — inventing a firing trigger would be FUDGE (violates measured>fudge), and it adds NO consumer coverage the burst heal doesn't already provide every rotation, so it is left unmodeled and documented rather than mis-triggered. `skill2:[]` set explicitly to suppress the prose parser's S2 output (all S2 lines audited above). ⚑⚑⚑ (1) CADENCE TUPLE (MANDATORY, datamine-unreliable): pullsPerSec (SG rate-of-fire) + reloadFrames 111 + any rolling/partial reload — SHIP datamine defaults (no charFixes written); recipe = read rounds/min + reload gap from a focus video. (2) SG PELLET LANDING/spray fraction is the DOMINANT lever for her thin solo (per-unit ⚑; the class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table is engine-side, not written here); recipe = focused solo, per-magazine pellet-counter deltas by range band. (3) TICKET steady-state count = 2 (est., casterMaxHpPct 20); recipe = confirm she reaches + holds 2 tickets in a real fight (no squad-HP<15% consume events expected under scope-lock). No noFb/noRange set (no rider damage exists). 0-FB solo status changes nothing damage-wise (no FB-gated damage lines).
